channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-13719] lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
item.description:
What do these error messages mean?

Jun 26 09:33:29 r575i7n17 kernel: [1593189209.929168] LustreError: 14922:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff8cb058d24800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i1n8 kernel: [1593190262.452755] LustreError: 28219:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff88b09829b800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i6n1 kernel: [1593190262.737288] LustreError: 83582:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff996526c7b000: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i4n11 kernel: [1593190262.752902] LustreError: 32785:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff99763b283000: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i1n5 kernel: [1593190262.861013] LustreError: 74300:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff8e93ddcfe000: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1

Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i2n13 kernel: [1593190262.929801] LustreError: 8675:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff920e9b8d9800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 09:51:02 r591i2n15 kernel: [1593190262.978701] LustreError: 72665:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff9f501d746800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1

Jun 26 10:01:02 r587i2n3 kernel: [1593190862.924535] LustreError: 74253:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff89eb5bbe1000: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 10:01:02 r587i5n4 kernel: [1593190862.949333] LustreError: 52839:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff967c5b7de800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1
Jun 26 10:01:03 r589i4n11 kernel: [1593190863.101217] LustreError: 99879:0:(lov_obd.c:839:lov_cleanup()) nbp7-clilov-ffff92885d2c4800: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1

item.summary: lov tgt 36 not cleaned! deathrow=0, lovrc=1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
